raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California high schools' implementation of ethnic studies curriculum has raised deep concerns.",
    "AB 1468 will standardize teaching ethnic studies across California.",
    "The bill aims to protect students from inaccurate or biased information being taught in classrooms.",
    "The California State Board of Education will develop and adopt uniform content standards for high school ethnic studies instruction.",
    "The advisory committee for AB 1468 will include academic experts in various ethnic studies disciplines.",
    "The lack of clear standards for ethnic studies has resulted in lawsuits and factually inaccurate materials.",
    "There is an increased risk of biased ideological agendas affecting ethnic studies curriculum in California.",
    "The infusion of bias in ethnic studies poses a threat to the safety of Jewish students.",
    "Antisemitism in California has increased since the October 7 attacks.",
    "California's ethnic studies curriculum must reflect the stories of vulnerable communities.",
    "Strong, clear standards are necessary to prevent bias and hate from taking root in ethnic studies."
  ]
}
```
